images.prompt: A raw, ultra‑realistic 8k photograph of a stunning Japanese idol‑inspired model, early‑20s, flawless yet naturally textured skin with visible pores and soft vellus hair, large expressive dark eyes, a cute yet seductive smile, and a fit, curvy silhouette—slim waist, ample yet perky bust, long straight black silky hair—standing on a moss‑clad rock beside a cascading tropical waterfall. She wears a cropped, white ribbed tank top with thin spaghetti straps that hug her figure, over a tiny, form‑fitting black lace bralette visible beneath the sheer fabric, paired with high‑waisted denim shorts rolled at the hem to reveal a sliver of the midriff, and a loose plaid shirt loosely tied around her waist, the sleeves fluttering in the humid breeze. Sun‑dappled amber street‑light glow filters through the lush canopy, casting a warm, bright illumination on her skin while the waterfall mist adds a gentle, luminous haze; the background is a soft bokeh of emerald foliage and drifting water spray, emphasizing the ultra‑sharp foreground. Shot on Sony A7R IV with an 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, shallow depth of field, global illumination, and ray‑traced lighting for crisp, true‑to‑life clarity, finished with a bleach‑bypass color grade that delivers high contrast and low saturation, giving the image a relaxed weekend vibe and a viral‑ready, cinematic polish.8k photo, Large breasts
